astro_highlight: Sun square Pluto — the will to transform clashes with the need for control. Adaptation required on both sides.
reading: Three to five paragraphs of the 300-500 word website reading. Written in maps' voice — direct, dry, zero filler. Divination without the crystals-and-good-vibes framing. Technical precision meets the uncanny.
tweet_excerpt: Short 12-15 line version for twitter. The skill writes this too.
